violations.text: Cases of produce were observed stored on the floor in the (produce) walk-in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The condensate from the walk-in refrigeration unit is draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Tortillas was observed being sold from an unapproved source. PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

(Deli meats and cheese) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

(Various food product) packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address.PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (basement, walk in coolers, and trailers(outside) ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The cutting boards in the (meat dept ) are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Wood is used in the construction of (support beams for ceiling and door threshold and frame in meat walk in cooler ) in the (walk in coolers ) area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
The cold water faucet handle observed in poor repair. Handle is missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The condensate from the (walk in cooler) refrigeration unit is dripping onto to covered boxes of meat. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The ceilings, fans, fan base have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024

Meat Case is lacking a consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
Establishment had tortillas from an unapproved source. See disposal Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Raw animal foods were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arrranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Establishment is lacking a consumer advisory. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
Food was observed stored on the floor throughout establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

The cutting boards in the meat area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
